programme.title: Donkey Kong Country
programme.desc: When Polly Roger steals the Crystal Coconut, Donkey Kong and Diddy chase him into the Ancient Temple Ruins in an effort to get it back. (S1 E06)

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country
programme.desc: Cranky offers free physical to everyone on Kongo Bongo Island. (S1 E07)

programme.title: Kate & Mim-Mim
programme.desc: It's Mimiloo Day, so the gang is building a new clubhouse that can fit all their Mimiloo friends! But when the clubhouse turns out all crooked, they'll have to rush to fix it in time for the Mimiloo Day party! / Tack shrinks Kate, Mim-Mim and the gang and transports them inside Mim-Mim's fluffy brain to help him track down a lost memory!

programme.title: Kate & Mim-Mim
programme.desc: Kate and Mim-Mim land in Oz instead of Mimiloo, and discover that their twirl magic has been stolen by Violet the witch, who is everything purple in Oz for herself! To get home, Kate and Mim-Mim must find the Wizard of Oz and ask for his help!

programme.title: Kate & Mim-Mim
programme.desc: The Mimiloo gang are making a movie! But Mim-Mim is so busy running errands, he misses his chance to be in it! / Kate, Mim-Mim, and the gang face a puzzling problem when the Mimiloo sky starts to fall down in puzzle pieces and its soon made worse by Boomer's fear of the dark!

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.desc: S1:E18 Mind vs Body | Tunnel Trouble | The Desert-of-Death-that-Kills - Prisoners are encouraged to let their minds go, during a yoga class… Averell's spirit leaves his body and travels through walls, just ike a ghost! Although Averell's spirit is as stupid as usual, his ethereal mind actually can help his fellow Daltons escape…

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.desc: S1:E19 Smoke without Fire | The Daltons play rugby | The Daltons go Wrestling - The prairie suddenly fills with smoke signals… shaped like death skulls! Peabody's convinced this means the Indians are about to attack, and demands help from the army. Instead of troops he gets a single veteran...

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.desc: S1:E20 Up, up and away! | Oil Leak | The Daltons get recycled - Why climb up walls, if walls can float YOU up? Joe has a new amazing scheme – he'll change the penitentiary into a giant hot air balloon! But he didn't reckon on air currents…

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.desc: S1:E21 Prison-sickness | Goofy Golf | Big and Not Bright - The Daltons escape at last. As soon as they're outside, they break out in pimples, and have trouble breathing. They meet Fabulous Falcon who diagnoses this peculiar affliction: “ prison-sickness ”.

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.desc: S1:E22 Trompe-l'œil | UFO goofs | The Prophecy - Joe wake up one morning to see a delicatessen right in front of him in their cell! Averell chuckles- it's not real! He just painted it!! Joe leaps out of bed and dashes over to test the wall: it's true! It's a trompe-l'œil!

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.desc: S1:E23 The Daltons' Christmas | The Daltons go Snow-crazy | Totem Pole Daltons - The Daltons build a chimney and fireplace for Santa Claus… with the hidden ambition of escaping through the conduit! Unfortunately, a few inmates hold a grudge against Santa and they're eager to get even with him for once and all…

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.desc: S1:E24 Dr. Jeff Kill and Mr. Averell | Sceptical Sorcerer | The Flint-Daltons - Doctor Jeff Kill wants to try out a new anti-criminal vaccine on the inmates. It's supposed to heal the obscure side to the criminal mind. Joe manages to avoid this forced vaccination after Averell accidentally ingests a massive dose of the criminal virus...

programme.title: Dogtanian and the Three Muskehounds
programme.desc: Dogtanian is an ambitious young swordsman who dreams of becoming a hero and joining the legendary Muskehounds. After proving his skills and earning their trust, he and the three Muskehounds must defend the King from the villainous Cardinal Richelieu's secret plot to seize power.

programme.title: Mosley
programme.desc: To save his family, Mosley, must embark on an epic journey to find the legendary Uprights... but what he unexpectedly finds will unlock a secret revealing his true nature. With large and layered themes, Mosley tells a timeless adventurous tale of family, love and hope!

programme.title: Rabbit Academy
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit meets Monsters University in the exciting, animated feature Rabbit Academy. This vibrant and colourful family adventure follows Max, the first city rabbit to be chosen in the master class for Easter Rabbits.

programme.title: Swiped
programme.desc: A womanising college student enlists his nerdy roommate to code the ultimate hook up app by offering to pay his tuition for MIT but unexpected consequences ensue.

programme.title: 36 Husbands
programme.desc: 36 Husbands is a mystical, musical, Kung Fu spy comedy starring 3 powerful women - and a bunch of husbands. Krista, top spy and Kung Fu master, has extraordinary powers and she puts them in action on her quest to slow down the steady march towards World War III.

programme.title: Cold Souls
programme.desc: In response to shiny, bigger, better American consumerism comes COLD SOULS, a surreal comedy in which souls can be extracted and traded as commodities.

programme.title: Love Sarah
programme.desc: Three generations of women, led by Mimi will need to overcome grief, doubts and differences to honour the memory of their beloved Sarah, while embarking on a journey to establish a new bakery in Notting Hill, a place filled with love, hope and colourful pastries from all over the world.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: Perfect Pairing
programme.desc: A food critic loses her memory while visiting a winery she panned in the past, owned and operated by single dad Michael. Starring Nazneen Contractor (2022)

programme.title: 40 Below And Falling
programme.desc: Kate is desperate to get to her wedding, but due to a snowstorm, she is stuck. Will the mysterious mountain man help her get to the church on time or will calamity come Kates why? (2015)

programme.title: Love on Iceland
programme.desc: Chole wishes to bring her college friends back together for a trip to Iceland. Will an unexpected guest and seeing the northern lights, give her the new perspective on life and love? (2020)

programme.title: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: A recently dumped travel writer goes on a ski getaway with her best friend and they find themselves double booked with two eligible men. When they are snowed in, love ensues, as it always does. (2018)

programme.title: One Winter Proposal
programme.desc: Cara and Megan return to the ski resort where they met Ben and Sean last winter. Find out what they have been up to this all year. (2019)

programme.title: Deadly Exchange
programme.desc: A mother and daughter invite an exchange student into home, only to be interrupted by a suspicious murder. Starring Lindsay Hartley (2016)

programme.title: Deadly Vows
programme.desc: Pastry chef Helena poisons men who don't meet her high standards. Her fiancé's sister begins to be suspicious of her actions. Starring Brittany Underwood (2017)

programme.title: Ex-Wife Killer
programme.desc: A woman vouches for her ex-husband after he seemingly kills his new wife in self-defence but after he is let off the hook, she discovers his elaborate ploy. Starring Marguerite Moreau (2017)

programme.title: Washed Away
programme.desc: Whilst attempting to move on from her husband's death, a woman discovers him alive and well. Starring Emmanuelle Vaugier (2017)

programme.title: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: An uptight and by-the-book cop (Reese Witherspoon) tries to protect the sexy and outgoing widow (Sofia Vergara) of a drug boss as they race through Texas pursued by crooked cops and murderous gunmen.

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: One thousand years after cataclysmic events forced humanity's escape from Earth, Nova Prime has become mankind's new home. Legendary General Cypher Raige returns from an extended tour of duty to his estranged family, ready to be a father to his 13-year-old son, Kitai.

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: In the epic origin story the legend of Hercules, a half-god, half-man blessed with extraordinary streng. Betrayed by his stepfather, the king, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers.

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide
programme.desc: A pair of detectives investigate the murder of a rap group while pursuing their other full-time professions.

programme.title: The Prince and the Pauper
programme.desc: Poor boy Tom Canty and Edward, Prince of Wales exchange identities, but events force the pair to experience each other's lives as well.

programme.title: Lena and Snowball
programme.desc: Bullied at school and lonely at home, Lena keeps hoping she'll have a true friend someday. One afternoon, her dreams come true - in the shape of a cuddly white lion cub. Lena tries to keep playful Snowball out of trouble, but the clumsy poachers who kidnapped the valuable cub, and the cruel trophy collector who paid for him, are desperate to get him back. As Lena races to rescue poor Snowball, her new friend Jake will do anything to help. Be careful, or Snowball will melt your family's heart.

programme.title: Spirit Riders
programme.desc: When a rebellious teen is arrested and sentenced to an equine therapy camp, she forms a connection with a spirited thoroughbred that she helps train with the guidance of the ranch's no-nonsense owner.

programme.title: White Vengeance
programme.desc: Two inexplicably coherent zombies awake amidst a zombie attack, and decide to take a road trip

programme.title: Dying for a Baby
programme.desc: Amber and Kyle are ready to move on after a car accident two years ago. But their world turns upside down when Jessica, the other driver who lost her unborn baby in the accident, moves in next door and gets a job with Amber's doctor - all in a plan to seek a cold form of revenge.

programme.title: Killer Reputation
programme.desc: A public relations maven takes pride in her low profile and reputation. However, she risks both to help a fading action star, who is also her college sweetheart, after he is accused of killing his ex-wife.

programme.title: Operation Valkyrie
programme.desc: High commanding officers conspire a plot to assassinate Adolf Hitler in July 1944. Based on a true story.

programme.title: George And The Dragon
programme.desc: A knight (James Purefoy, "Rome") returning from the Crusades takes on a dragon after the disappearance of the kindly Princess Lunna (Piper Perabo, "Coyote Ugly"). With Patrick Swayze.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: When he breaks up with his girlfriend, he discovers his ex is actually the reluctant superhero, G Girl. A scorned woman, she unleashes her super powers to humiliate and torment him.

programme.title: Memoirs Of An Invisible Man
programme.desc: When a government experiment goes awry it renders an innocent bystander invisible.

programme.title: Incident at Loch Ness
programme.desc: The film director Werner Herzog lends cinematic gravitas to this mockumentary about the Loch Ness Monster.

programme.title: Incident at Loch Ness
programme.desc: The film director Werner Herzog lends cinematic gravitas to this mockumentary about the Loch Ness Monster.

programme.title: Mongolian Death Worm
programme.desc: During an oil fracking operation, a nest of deadly creatures that have been dormant for centuries is awakened!

programme.title: Mongolian Death Worm
programme.desc: During an oil fracking operation, a nest of deadly creatures that have been dormant for centuries is awakened!

programme.title: James Cameron's Deepsea Challenge
programme.desc: Filmmaker James Cameron ventures to the bottom of the sea, capturing never-before-seen vistas and creatures.

programme.title: James Cameron's Deepsea Challenge
programme.desc: Filmmaker James Cameron ventures to the bottom of the sea, capturing never-before-seen vistas and creatures.

programme.title: Megafault
programme.desc: A seismologist must stop a devastating earthquake from ripping the Earth apart.

programme.title: Megafault
programme.desc: A seismologist must stop a devastating earthquake from ripping the Earth apart.

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: Love N' Dancing
programme.desc: Jessica (Amy Smart) had given up on her dream of a life of the stage, until she meets ex-dance champion Jake (Tom Malloy), who becomes her teacher when the couple make an instant connection. Together, they decide to risk it all when they enter the World Swing Championship to reclaim Jake's former title.

programme.title: 12 in a Box
programme.desc: 12 IN A BOX is the laugh-out-loud story of 12 former school friends who get together for a reunion they will never forget, where they are given the chance to win a life-changing 1million each. The only catch is, they cannot leave the estate for 96 hours, and anyone who enters the grounds must also stay for the duration! With time ticking away, the mismatched dozen are forced to work together to keep the peace and work toward their payday. But, when they have to deal with an untimely death, a kidnapping plot, another corpse, burglars, and then even a visit from the boys in blue, will this hapless clan be able to hold it together or will their dreams of riches be buried with the bodies? Staring Miranda Hart (Miranda, Call the Midwife) and Katy Wix (Not Going Out), this is classic British farce at its best.

programme.title: Tomorrow Morning
programme.desc: Tomorrow Morning is the story of one couple seen in two separate timelines, a decade apart. This is a story of life, love, misunderstanding and hope... a universal and timeless tale.

programme.title: The Monster
programme.desc: A mother and daughter must confront a terrifying monster when they break down on a deserted road.

programme.title: Shelter
programme.desc: A high-octane, edge-of-your-seat thriller, starring Neta Riskin and Golshifteh Farahani. Israeli Mossad agent, Naomi is sent to protect Mona, a beautiful Lebanese informant who is recovering from plastic surgery to conceal her identity. In a safe house in Hamburg, the women form an unexpected bond, and experience a complex labyrinth of mistrust, loyalty, deception and betrayal.

programme.title: The White King
programme.desc: Djata is a care-free 12-year-old growing up in a brutal dictatorship shut off from the outside world. When the government imprisons his father, Peter, and Djata and his mother Hannah are labelled traitors, the boy will not rest until he sees his father again.

programme.title: 12 Hour Shift
programme.desc: One night, do no harm for one junkie nurse thats not an oath shes willing to keep. Mandy (Angela Bettis - May) finds herself beholden to a gang of organ-traffickers (David Arquette - The Scream Franchise, Mick Foley - WWE) and when a kidney goes missing she's going to do whatever it takes. Throw in to the mix a strung out cousin with bad judgement and the bodies begin to pile up.

programme.title: Killerman
programme.desc: When NYC money launderer Moe Diamond (Liam Hemsworth - The Hunger Games) wakes up from a car crash, he's left with no memory, millions in stolen cash, and an insane crew of dirty cops hunting him down. With a stranger (Emory Cohen - Lords of Chaos) who says he's his best friend and a fiance he doesn't remember, Moe must race against the clock to discover his own identity and escape his past.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: Finding Love in Mountain View
programme.desc: After learning she's been entrusted to take care of her deceased cousin's children, an architect is torn between focusing on her career and honouring her cousin's wish.

programme.title: Forever In My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs—back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Our Dream Wedding
programme.desc: Commitment-shy Haley is as anti-marriage as it gets, but when she tries on her grandma's ‘magical' wedding veil, she's transported to her future, where she and long-term boyfriend Scott are happily married with two beautiful children.

programme.title: Hint of Love
programme.desc: A cookbook literary agent with culinary training is tasked with helping elevate the brand of a food channel personality known for his convenience-oriented recipes. However, as the agent works with her client on a new cookbook, she must choose between following the directions or her heart.

programme.title: Royal Runaways
programme.desc: A prince doesn't want to become King after his father dies, so he hides at a winery as a handyman to follow his own path.

programme.title: Dream Girl
programme.desc: A young engaged man on the verge of success meets a beautiful woman he can inexplicably connect with in his dreams. Starring: Skyler Caleb, Meg Cionni, Tim Daly

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie finds true love in London just days before she is to return to the US. They are separated, but as fate would have it, they reunite 6 years later in the US.

programme.title: Save The Wedding
programme.desc: Meg and Tyler have never gotten along with each other but when they work together to save the best friends' wedding, they discover they actually make a good team and begin a little romance of their own.

programme.title: Marilyn Hotchkiss Ballroom Dancing & Charm School
programme.desc: A widowed man's life turns upside down when he embarks on a journey to find a dying man's long lost love.

programme.title: Our Wild Hearts
programme.desc: Willow, a determined young teenager, is obsessed with the idea of meeting the father she never knew. She leaves her cushy life in Malibu to travel to the Sierra Nevada mountains, where she pays a surprise visit to Jack, a rugged cowboy who has no idea he's a father. As the two struggle to bond, Willow makes a connection with a wild mustang, Bravo. Jack wants to capture and tame the magnificent horse, but Willow is convinced he needs to be free. Will the wild stallion that brought them together end up tearing them apart?

programme.title: Surviving Love
programme.desc: Jessica Miller is thrust into the "real" world when she graduates from college. To conquer this new world, she must discover her faith, open a box of memories and learn the simple secrets of life only a mother can share.

programme.title: Identical Love
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Dr. Charlotte Hudson needs to escape life at home. She signs up to volunteer at a health clinic in a tropical country. But her plans of escaping are thrown off when she comes across her former fiancé's twin brother, Seth (a dentist), who is also volunteering with the clinic. As they spend time together, Seth falls in love with Charlotte, but she struggles to let go of seeing her fiancé every time she looks at Seth. The island romance will help her break free from the past and love Seth for who he is.

programme.title: Horse Camp – A Love Tail
programme.desc: It's a new year at summer horse-riding camp but everything is different this time-a new head counselor, new friends to make, and to spice things up, the ranch hand has a crush on the head riding instructor. When he is too nervous to reveal his feelings, the campers put competition aside and rally together to help him win over her heart while building friendships that will last a lifetime.

programme.title: Love In Aruba
programme.desc: A lonely teacher (Amber) is hired by Connor, the single father of a struggling student. She is to tutor his daughter Macey (age 10) over a summer while they travel for his work. As Amber helps Macey, she sees glimpses of what's missing in the family's life. Their grand destinations are filled with rich items and potential rewarding business deals, but it's missing heart. Amber's influence fills the void and brings Macey and Connor together. With it, Amber starts to fall in love with Connor, but can he see her as anything beyond the hired help?

programme.title: 'Til Lies Do Us Part
programme.desc: Philadelphia critic suspects cheating husband, hires investigator with own agenda.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets by The Lake
programme.desc: Original idea by LMN & Harlequin uncovers Thornwood Heights' murder secrets.

programme.title: Fatal Honeymoon
programme.desc: True story: Newlywed dies on honeymoon, husband's guilt investigated.

programme.title: 'Til Lies Do Us Part
programme.desc: Philadelphia critic suspects cheating husband, hires investigator with own agenda.

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A newly engaged woman makes a wish that her fiancee take the planning of their wedding seriously, and to her surprise and dismay, her wish comes true.

programme.title: One Last Dance
programme.desc: In the wake of tragedy, a renowned NY dance company is on the brink of collapse. After leaving the dance world for good, Travis, Chrissa and Max have one last chance to re-connect with the passion and prove that miracles really can happen.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Million Dollar Matchmaker Patti Stanger to host a series of dates for Morgan, one of her single friends.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Million Dollar Matchmaker Patti Stanger to host a series of dates for Morgan, one of her single friends.

programme.title: Sisters of the Groom
programme.desc: Jason ropes his neighbor Sarah into pretending to be his girlfriend for his brother's wedding but his prying sisters suspect something is amiss.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: Jason Segel and Cameron Diaz star in this fun and racy comedy about a married couple on a wildly hysterical mission to recover their missing sex tape.

programme.title: Drinking Buddies
programme.desc: Luke and Kate are co-workers at a Chicago brewery, where they spend their days drinking and flirting. They're perfect for each other, except that they're both in relationships.

programme.title: Sydney White
programme.desc: In a college comedy that puts a modern-day twist on an age-old story, Sydney White tells the tale of a tomboy freshman who ditches her conniving sorority sisters and finds a new home with a group of very dorky outcasts. Fed up with the way they've all been treated, she's off to war against the reigning campus royalty.

Fed up with the way they've all been treated, she's off to war against the reigning campus royalty.

programme.title: Arizona Colt Returns
programme.desc: Famed gunman Arizona Colt is sent by Moreno to rescue his daughter from the grips of Arizona's old enemy, Keane. But certain complications make the mission far more dangerous than expected.

programme.title: Heroes of Fort Worth
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a group of confederate soldiers with the help of Apache Indians, try to defeat a Union fort, while trying to gain support from Emperor Maximillian of Mexico.

programme.title: Hannie Caulder
programme.desc: After she is raped by the trio of outlaw brothers who murdered her husband, a frontierswoman hires a bounty hunter to instruct her in the use of a gun so she can exact her revenge.

programme.title: GENEVIEVE
programme.desc: Cheerful British comedy set against the London to Brighton car rally.

programme.title: Geordie
programme.desc: "Geordie" is a charming love story set in the Highlands of Scotland. It tells the story of a very small boy who feels that the girl he loves will ignore him because of his size. So he takes a correspondence course in body-building, becoming one of the tallest and strongest men in Scotland and an expert at throwing the hammer.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: Max Winslow and the House of Secrets
programme.desc: Five teens are invited to the home of an eccentric billionaire to compete in a game to win his mansion. The night takes a dark turn when they become trapped in the house and are forced to face off against each other and an evil AI entity who controls everything in the house including their fate.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: Absolute Denial

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Cass work together to save a racehorse with a career-ending condition, while the arrival of a former girlfriend forces Tim to see his current relationship in a new light. Meanwhile, Georgie's attempt to help Olivia backfires when it threatens Adam's campaign for class president. And Jack's missing cell phone creates a rift with Lisa.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Georgie's school project on Val Stanton inspires her to take a risk with Adam. Meanwhile, a shocking announcement from Caleb makes Ty question why Amy hasn't told him some important news. And Jack hires new help for Heartland after a close call puts several horses in danger.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Lou returns from New York she is forced to confront two interlopers: Heartland's new ranch hand, and a trendy food truck that is threatening Maggie's business. Meanwhile, Amy struggles to help a challenging client regain her confidence. Then, after Georgie insists that she and Adam are nothing more than “friends,” she is devastated when she sees him at a party with another girl. And Tim makes a difficult decision about his future.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou finds herself trapped at the Dude Ranch with Mitch, the new ranch hand, and they both reveal the circumstances of their recent pasts. While helping Amy treat a client horse, Ty feels conflicted about opening a mysterious package that has ties to his troubled past. And Jack and Lisa cope with a health scare, while Georgie and Adam deal with the fallout from Adam's kiss with another girl.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: While trying to help Cass learn to handle a spirited horse, Amy discovers there is more riding on their success than she initially realized. Meanwhile, Tim insists the entire Heartland family attend a Hudson holiday party where Lou is forced to deal with a series of unexpected events, not the least of which is Peter's sudden appearance. When tragedy strikes at the Wildlife Reserve, Georgie risks her life to save a herd of miniature horses and Ty steps in to offer support when Bob's dream of expanding the Reserve goes up in smoke. Meanwhile, when Remi destroys his new fly-fishing bait supplies, Jack holds onto his grudge against the dog in order to win a bet with Lisa.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When their plans to get away are thwarted, Amy and Ty celebrate their first anniversary closer to home and Amy unveils a special surprise. Meanwhile, Peter lobbies for a reunion forcing Lou to make a difficult decision about her and her family's future. While her parents grapple with their decision, Georgie has to act quickly on a trail ride when she learns a secret about Adam that leaves his life hanging in the balance. And Ty steps up to convince the devastated Bob to reconsider when he decides to throw in the towel at the Wildlife Reserve.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: As Amy and Ty prepare for parenthood, they work together to resolve a dangerous pregnancy issue. Meanwhile, Georgie may be forced to give up something she loves when a demanding new Extreme Team coach arrives on the scene. Then, Lou has to decide whether she should tackle a new business venture that may take her away from the Heartland family. When Jack and Mitch work together with the herd, Tim is not ready to be pushed aside. And Georgie and Adam find the perfect way to celebrate an anniversary.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty performs life-saving surgery on a mare, while Amy and the family work around-the-clock to bottle feed the mare's twin foals. Meanwhile, Georgie's new coach overhears Georgie confront Sam when she suspects her of sabotage during an Extreme Team practice, and Sam blames Georgie when she loses her headliner status. Forced together on a trail ride, Lou and Mitch come to terms with their mutual attraction and Lou reaches a decision about her future. Adam pushes Georgie to dig deep when she has to write an essay on her “most memorable moment.” And when the goldfish Tim buys for Katie suddenly dies, Tim and Jack struggle with how to break the news to her.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Weeks Of War
programme.desc: By January 1945, it seemed the end of the war was in sight, but challenges still loomed on the Eastern Front, in the Pacific and in Western Europe.

programme.title: Weeks Of War
programme.desc: A look at the first weeks of a war that would disrupt the lives of so many, starting with the first shots fired by the Japanese in July 1937, China.

programme.title: Weeks Of War
programme.desc: How, between September 1940 and November 1941, things intensified as Nazi Germany exerted its dominance over Europe.

programme.title: Weeks Of War
programme.desc: From December 1941 to May 1942. Singapore falls, the Wannsee Conference is held in Berlin and a single event in the Pacific transforms the war into a total global conflict.

programme.title: Weeks Of War
programme.desc: By spring 1942, German armies had taken control. The battles of Midway and Stalingrad began and Americans achieved a ground-breaking milestone in the development of atomic weapons.

programme.title: Weeks Of War
programme.desc: 1943 begins with the Casablanca Conference. Events unfold in the week of the Soviet victory in Stalingrad, and one of the best-selling songs in history is released.

programme.title: Weeks Of War
programme.desc: Halfway through its fourth full year, the fortunes of war were running increasingly in favour of the Allies. The bombing of Hamburg and the Allied Tehran Conference take place.

programme.title: Princess Catherine: A New Kind of Queen
programme.desc: Princess of Wales, and Prince William are revolutionizing the royal family by raising their modern family

programme.title: Diana: Queen of Hearts
programme.desc: Close friends, family and world leaders profile the life of Diana, the Princess of Wales.

programme.title: Catherine de Medici
programme.desc: Catherine de Medici, born in Florence in 1519, was a noblewoman from a French family.

programme.title: Nefertiti's Daughters & The Sisters Of Tutankhamun
programme.desc: We discover the lives of all six children Queen Nefertiti was mother to, and the fate of the sisters of Tutankamun

programme.title: Nefertiti Where Is Her Mummy?
programme.desc: We explore the various theories about Nefertiti's mummy and tomb, as well as discovering new evidence in the search for the mysterious Egyptian Queen.

programme.title: Empress Who Rules The World
programme.desc: She's probably the most controversial woman in Chinese history – Wu Zetian, who rose from lowly concubine to become the only woman in all Chinese history to dare to take the title “Emperor” With hands-on investigations and access to the treasures of Wu Zetian's time, this film tries to give a definitive answer to the question: was Emperor Wu an evil tyrant or one of the most successful rulers in all Chinese history?

programme.title: Working (more than) 9 to 5
programme.sub-title: The Labouring Lives of Medieval Women
programme.desc: Dr. Eleanor Janega's book, 'The Once and Future Sex: Going Medieval on Women's Roles in Society'

programme.title: Eva Braun: Hitler's Mistress
programme.desc: Eva Braun captures exclusive private view of Nazi elite at Berghof.

programme.title: Deserts On The Move
programme.desc: Deserts On The Move - Asia: China and India are the world's two most populous countries. They are also burdened with two of the most famous ‘hot' deserts - the Gobi desert in Mongolia-China and the Thar desert in India-Pakistan. Most people do not think of China as a desert nation - and yet it is among the world's largest. A staggering third of China's land area, 2.5 million square kilometres, is useless sand.

programme.title: The Biblical Plagues
programme.desc: The Biblical Plagues - Darkness over Egypt: For a long time, scientists have tried to prove that nine of the Ten Plagues described in the Old Testament point to a serious breakdown of the climate, triggering an ecological chain reaction. Apart from theological considerations, scholars all over the world have studied individual phenomena, trying to explain the causes of this Biblical disaster.

programme.title: How the Vikings Changed the World
programme.desc: A nation of seafarers and merchants, the Vikings revolutionised exploration and trading in the Middle Ages and discovered America 500 years before Columbus. This gripping film unveils their bad reputation as wild, murdering and pillaging norsemen as misguided and reveals a strikingly tolerant people with an elaborate trading network that stretched right through Europe. For 900 years, their light, manoeuvrable sailing-ships could not be matched. As the best seafarers of their time, daring, tolerant explorers and expert merchants, they set new benchmarks and left their mark everywhere.

programme.title: The New Regime
programme.desc: The Franco myth stands for a cruel regime: for the darkest chapter in Spanish history. Franco gave himself the title of Caudillo de España - Supreme Leader of Spain. He created his own rituals of power: the war hero, the family man, and the mass murderer. Franco was a man of many faces.

programme.title: The Heirs of the Knights Templar
programme.desc: The Freemasons are the secret brotherhood with the most members. More than four million followers regularly gather in their temples and lodges. Their fundamental ideals are liberty, equality, fraternity, tolerance and humanity. It is because of their rituals, some of them bizarre, and their self-imposed secrecy that there are still conspiracy theories about this secret order.

programme.title: The Pamir Highway
programme.desc: The Central Asian Pamir Highway has many surprises in store for its travellers. Our journey will take us some 1,300 kilometres, beginning in Tajikistan, then down the River Panj along the border with Afghanistan and on to Kyrgyzstan.

programme.title: Animals That Changed History
programme.desc: Animals That Changed History - Season 1 - Food: Human life today would be very different if our ancestors had not stopped hunting animal protein. In the Fertile Crescent - known today as the Middle East - humans travelled in nomadic groups of hunter-gatherers and ate what they killed.

programme.title: Episode 2: The Age Of Discovery
programme.desc: Columbus has no idea that because of Earth's geology and geography he won't get to his destination…or how that failure made his voyage one of the most influential.

programme.title: Episode 3: The Industrial Revolution And Modern Warfare
programme.desc: How do prehistoric forests link to the development of steam engines, and the rise of modern industry?

programme.title: The Silver Rush
programme.desc: Discover what happens when the King of Spain's supply of silver meets the Emperor of China's tax demands. This story places China at the center of globalization.

programme.title: The China Trade
programme.desc: China has always been an economic powerhouse. Spin back just over two hundred years to see what "addictive" goods are at the heart of China's trade with Great Britain.

programme.title: A Clash of Empires
programme.desc: As the balance of power shifts from the Chinese Empire to Great Britain, China is once again the world's biggest importer of silver–thanks to new high-tech industries

programme.title: Episode 1: The Rise Of Civilization
programme.desc: About 8,000 BC, in a few select places some people begin to experiment with a new way of harvesting energy. They're growing their own crops.

programme.title: Episode 2: The Age Of Discovery
programme.desc: Columbus has no idea that because of Earth's geology and geography he won't get to his destination…or how that failure made his voyage one of the most influential.

programme.title: Supersized Structures
programme.desc: People have labored on gigantic undertakings such as roads, bridges, and canals linking oceans.

programme.title: Extreme Construction
programme.desc: Explore the original construction of the Suez Canal in 1859 and look into the expansion of it.

programme.title: Extreme Construction
programme.desc: A look at the extreme construction behind the Paris Metro, a vital part of the city spanning nearly 137 miles.

programme.title: Extreme Construction
programme.desc: Look at one of the largest cruise ships in the world and how it was built.

programme.title: Engineering The Future
programme.desc: Engineers are working on developing technology to harness the ocean's tides, using sub sea kites

programme.title: Engineering The Future
programme.desc: The sixth largest greenhouse gas emitter, is transforming its industry by developing innovative machines

programme.title: Supersized Structures
programme.desc: For as long as man has been alive, he has fought to defend what is rightfully his.

programme.title: Inside Windsor Castle Part 2
programme.desc: Windsor Castle is the oldest, largest continually inhabited castle in the world.

programme.title: KinKingKing Charles III: A New Era
programme.desc: Queen Elizabeth II is dead. The sun has set on the second great Elizabeth era. The Prince of Wales ascends to the throne and becomes King Charles III.

programme.title: Sphinx V
programme.sub-title: Legends of History: Nebukadnezar - I am Incomparable
programme.desc: Travellers have always been fascinated by the ancient weather-beaten stone relief over 2,000 years old in the Lebanese town of Wadi Brisa it shows a life-size figure wearing the crown of a Babylonian king killing a lion. It is a portrait of one of the most famous and at the same time notorious rulers of all time. Even today, over 2,580 years after his death, his name is as well-known as that of Julius Caesar and Alexander the Great: Nebuchadnezzar, the legendary king of Babylon from 604 to 562 BC.

programme.title: Harry: The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Who is the 'real' Prince Harry?

programme.title: KKingsKing Charles and Queen Camilla: Into the Unknown
programme.desc: The past, present and future of a royal romance which has survived against all odds.

programme.title: King without a Crown
programme.desc: "King Without a Crown" explores the story of King Constantine II of Greece, who reigned for just three years before being ousted by a military coup in 1967. The film traces his rise as a beloved young monarch, his downfall due to political inexperience, and the abolition of the monarchy. After decades in exile, Constantine returns to Greece, reflecting on his legacy and the future of the country.

programme.title: Bucketlist Africa
programme.desc: Africa: one of the most iconic and diverse continents. It's packed with a spectacular range of habitats and environments, and home to some of the best loved and dramatic wildlife on the planet. From the small and surprising to the enormous and entertaining, there's something for everyone's bucket list on this vast continent. From camels to giraffes, gorillas to buffalo, the sheer range of wildlife found in Africa is unbelievable. With so much to see, where would you begin your bucket list adventure?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Upon arrival in Zimbabwe, Kristina Guberman heads to Hwange National Park - renowned for it's impressive elephant herds. She learns about these gentle giants, encounters cheetah on foot and chances upon a cheetah hunt with her guide, David.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels to the Mana Pools National Park with guide Craig van Zyl. They come across mating lions, have close encounters with bull elephants and canoe just meters away from imposing hippos and crocodiles on the mighty Zambezi River.

programme.title: Bucketlist Australia
programme.desc: If Australia makes you think of beaches and BBQs, cricket and cork hats, you haven't seen anything yet. Giant deserts, ancient rainforest, tropical coasts and mystical rock formations. And not forgetting some of the weirdest and most wonderful animals on the planet. From iconic kangaroos and emus to the fearsome cassowary and cuddly koalas, you can find creatures here that you'll find nowhere else on the planet. There's only one place where you can find all these bucket list encounters – Australia!

programme.title: Bucketlist Europe
programme.desc: Europe is a densely packed continent, with some 700 million residents living across 50 countries. It's famed for its ancient cities and civilisations, but is sometimes overlooked when it comes to the natural world. But there's no doubt that the continent is a treasure trove of natural beauty, a mosaic of landscapes each filled with their own unique animal communities. If you were planning a bucket list trip of the natural wonders of Europe, you'd only have to ask yourself one question: where would you start?

programme.title: Bucketlist South America
programme.desc: One of the biggest continents crammed with adventures and possibilities, South America should be up there on any wildlife watcher's bucket list. From record breaking rivers and longest mountain ranges to the steepest waterfalls and most massive rainforests, the variety of landscapes supports a seemingly endless diversity of wildlife. Here you can find the biggest rodents, otters and parrots, with unique mammals and marine life and spectacular predators. Make sure you don't miss South America!

programme.title: Bucketlist Africa
programme.desc: Africa: one of the most iconic and diverse continents. It's packed with a spectacular range of habitats and environments, and home to some of the best loved and dramatic wildlife on the planet. From the small and surprising to the enormous and entertaining, there's something for everyone's bucket list on this vast continent. From camels to giraffes, gorillas to buffalo, the sheer range of wildlife found in Africa is unbelievable. With so much to see, where would you begin your bucket list adventure?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Upon arrival in Zimbabwe, Kristina Guberman heads to Hwange National Park - renowned for it's impressive elephant herds. She learns about these gentle giants, encounters cheetah on foot and chances upon a cheetah hunt with her guide, David.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels to the Mana Pools National Park with guide Craig van Zyl. They come across mating lions, have close encounters with bull elephants and canoe just meters away from imposing hippos and crocodiles on the mighty Zambezi River.

programme.title: North America's National Parks
programme.desc: Yosemite National Park is a place of superlatives: with towering cliffs and giant sequoias, home to coyotes, black bears and the most elusive of all: the bobcat. Watch this documentary with ist spectacular shots, aerial views and time-lapse shots and learn some new facts about the biodiversity in one of North Americas most spectacular National Parks. (S1 E08)

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The Parque Nacional Peneda-Gerês is the only national park in Portugal. An area of almost 700 square kilometers, located in the extreme north of Portugal. Barren and rocky ridges in the plateaus, contrast with large forests and lush ground vegetation in deep valleys, crossed by lakes and rivers. The park is known for its oak forests, which are predominantly pedunculate and Pyrenean oaks. Among the typical animals of the park are the small Garrano ponies, a very old breed of horse and the only one in Europe that still lives in the wild. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The highest mountain range in Portugal is the Serra da Estrela. The episode embarks on a voyage of discovery to adventurous rock formations and villages steeped in tradition. The nature park is the largest protected area on the Iberian peninsula. In the mountain range we accompany the young scientist Ana Matos, who wants to breathe new life into old traditions, and cheese maker Maria Natália Lopes. She watches over more than 350 sheeps. (S1 E02)

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: In the southwest of Portugal lies the little known Parque Natural do Sudoeste Alentejano e Costa Vicentina. It encompasses a narrow coastal strip that runs along the coast to the south of Portugal. Sparsely populated, this coastal region, which was placed under protection in 1988, is considered one of the last intact ecosystems in Europe. The steep cliffs, the almost constant wind and high waves have ensured that mass tourism has not gained a foothold here. There are still near-natural forests and a diverse bird life. (S1 E03)

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: Madeira - Portugal's autonomous island in the Atlantic Ocean, is closer to the African coast than to the mother country Portugal, from which it is separated by about 900 kilometers. The island's name comes from Portuguese sailors who claimed the uninhabited isle for themselves in 1419. Madeira means wood and that was available in abundance. Almost the entire surface was covered by dense forest. Since 1982, two-thirds of the landscape has been protected. (S1 E04)

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The "Parque Natural da Ria Formosa" is one of the largest lagoon conservation areas in Europe. Bordered by five natural islands. A mosaic of sandbanks, brackish and freshwater lagoons and salt marshes. In 2010, the "Ria Formosa" was chosen as one of the seven natural wonders of Portugal. It is a unique ecosystem: in the winter months, more than 20,000 birds gather here. In addition, the nature park has one of the largest seahorse populations internationally. More than half of all fish species in the Atlantic are said to spawn in the lagoon. (S1 E05)

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage

programme.title: One Perfect Day in Kentucky
programme.desc: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFF's Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberly's ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise – a toast with Kentucky's own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. ‘s horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberly's horse wins the race. At Louisville's Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.

programme.title: USA Through Film 3
programme.desc: American cities have long played a starring role in its cinema. Notable actors and directors, including Hilary Swank, Helen Hunt, and Colman Domingo, tell stories about their favorite U.S. cities.

programme.title: Get Out of Town
programme.desc: Relive the golden age of Hollywood.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Just two hours north of Charlotte, Banner Elk offers a wide array of year-around activities for outdoor enthusiasts, but is most well known for their annual Highland Games, one of the largest celebrations of Scottish culture and tradition anywhere in the world. (S4 E03)

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: From lobster lovers to badass lobsterwomen, the charming seaside village of Rockland offers something for everyone—especially during the Rockland Lobster Festival, a delightful combination of games, art, and some of the freshest lobster you'll find anywhere. (S4 E04)

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: For over 50 years, bikers from around the world have gathered in Colorado to race the Durango & Silverton Narrow Gauge Railroad Train through the Rocky Mountains, over two mountain passes. (S4 E01)

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: The Twin Cities, Minneapolis and St. Paul, while distinct in character, share a deep appreciation for music and cultural diversity. Chunz and Makh set out to discover the sounds and messages of unity emerging in the African community with traditional performer Christian Adeti and dive into a new genre of Somali rap with rapper DJ Fawzi. With it's vibrant modern culture and rich musical history, The Twin Cities are a special destination you won't want to miss.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Kansas City, Missouri, is an integral part of jazz history in America. Shaped by legends who once graced its streets, it is bursting with deep history, mouth-watering cuisine and a lively jazz scene. World-renowned trumpeter, tap dancer, and entertainer, Lonnie McFadden and celebrated singer and tap dancer Chloe McFadden, show Chunz and Makh what it's all about. From finger-licking barbecue to sports events and a bustling nightlife, this city is a cultural hub offering endless opportunities for a fun-filled getaway.

programme.title: Wonders Of...
programme.desc: Undoubtedly this region's architecture comprised of several periods is some of the finest in Europe. Yacht lovers can't resist and Ashley finds the hidden secrets in the surrounding area from water polo games to horse back rides on the cliffs.

programme.title: Wonders Of...
programme.desc: Continental Croatia's abundance of land plays a key role for the country and Ashley experiences this while off roading through the plethora of vineyards and open space. Take a ride with Ashley as she rides the Lipizzaner horse breed from Croatia.

programme.title: China: Race to the Future
programme.desc: We visit Hefei and Guangzhou to discover the secret behind the success of China's new energy automobile industry. How did it achieve its R&D breakthroughs? And how did it become the world leader?

programme.title: China: Race to the Future
programme.desc: A group of space enthusiasts, have flied across the country to film every rocket launch. They captured almost every major launch and posted those amazing moments on the internet. If there's a manned space flight, they chase after.

programme.title: China: Race to the Future
programme.desc: There're two major cities nicknamed as 'magic city', namely, Shanghai and Chongqing. Hosts joined foreigners living in both cities to take a stroll around the classic routes to appreciate the changing cityscape.

programme.title: Foodwise
programme.desc: In Xilin Gol, the local cuisines here are so attractive to the tourists, such as the roasted lamb is a traditional local dish. And the fired stone fried lamb is so hard to find if you are not traveling to Inner Mongolia.Just join in this visual trip!

programme.title: Foodwise
programme.desc: Join host Tianran He in Kunming, the capital of Yunnan province in southwest China. Named the Spring City for its perennially good weather, Kunming is one of China's most ethnically diverse cities, something that's reflected in its food.

programme.title: Foodwise
programme.desc: Eva rediscovers her love for a classic century-old dish in her hometown Vienna. Meanwhile, Beijing's charming autumn season sets Tianran back in time as he rediscovers flavors from his childhood.

programme.title: Sweet Planet
programme.desc: From Teochew sweetrice cakes in China, sugarcane in India, to chocolate in Ivory Coast, this episode tells the story of how humans pursue and obtain sweetness, and how sweetness provides comfort and warmth to humanity.
